title: Axo's Horror Pack
description: A Horror Pack To Give You A Little Scare Along With Some Generation Mods
body:
This Is A Horror Pack Designed To Give You a Heart Attack (Some Mods Are From Curseforge)
Along With Terrain Generation Copper Armour And Much More

Dont Sue Me

**_WARNING_**
If You Have A Bad PC It Will Lag Alot

**MINIMUM:**
- OS: Windows 10 or later
  
- Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 (6 cores)
  
- Memory: 8 GB RAM
 
- Graphics: GeForce GTX 1660 / RX 5500 XT
  
- DirectX: Version 12
  
- Network: Broadband Internet connection
  
- Storage: 20 GB available space

 **RECOMMENDED:**
- OS: Windows 10 or later
  
- Processor: Intel Core i7-13700 / AMD Ryzen 7 7700X (8 cores)
  
- Memory: 16 GB RAM
  
- Graphics: Geforce RTX 2060 / Radeon RX 5600 XT
  
- DirectX: Version 12
  
- Network: Broadband Internet connection
  
- Storage: 20 GB available space

Aquaculture

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

Cosmetic Armour Reworked

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
